message:
feat(moe): implement 12 Balls mode for VIP expert pre-caching

Add expert-level hybrid mode that pre-caches VIP experts (0, 4) with Q4K
weights while streaming cold experts from SSD on-demand. This achieves
Q4K quality (+7.50 Paris logit) with smart LRU caching.

Key changes:
- Add expert_level_hybrid_mode flag and isFullExpertQ4KCached() check
- Add preloadVIPExpertsQ4K() to pre-cache VIP experts at startup
- Update forward loop with per-expert Q4K cache hit/miss logging
- Add --12balls flag to test_paris.zig for easy testing

Previous hybrid mixed mode (Q2K gate/up + Q4K down) failed due to 3.3x
intermediate value mismatch. The 12 Balls approach keeps entire experts
at Q4K quality, using LRU eviction to bound memory usage.
